source_pr.title: planner: add IGNORE_INDEX hint
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

add `IGNORE_INDEX` hint and change `INDEX` into `USE_INDEX` hint.

### What is changed and how it works?

Just handle `hintIgnoreIndex` as what `hintIndex` do.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - None

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - Need parser change

Release note

 - None

symptoms: sql: "select /*+ IGNORE_INDEX(t, c_d_e) */ c from t order by c", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds/changes optimizer hints, but no concrete intermittent flaky signature is provided in the case data.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR introduces the `IGNORE_INDEX` hint (and renames `INDEX` to `USE_INDEX`) and updates planner hint handling/tests. The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted flaky-test stabilization change, so keep it as needs-more-evidence rather than guessing nondeterminism categories.
